title: geophila orbicularis var. neblinae
intro: Geophila orbicularis var. neblinae, also known as Neblina geophila, is a variety of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, native to the Andes mountains. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Geophila orbicularis var. neblinae include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing. The plant is typically prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, with the leaves and stems being used in herbal preparations to harness its medicinal properties.
